    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Browser Security: Zero-Days Are Only Part of the Problem"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-03"

}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 70 threat advisories. Of these, 5 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 31 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
